heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–575, title I, § 116(c)(1)82 Stat. 1024Oct. 16, 1968
label: 981 to 996 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–575, title I, § 116(c)(1)82 Stat. 1024Oct. 16, 1968
notes: Section 981, , , ; , , , set forth Congressional declaration of purpose for the chapter and authorized appropriations to carry out such purpose.Pub. L. 89–287, § 279 Stat. 1037Pub. L. 90–460, § 2(d)(3)82 Stat. 634Oct. 22, 1965Aug. 3, 1968
Section 981 note, , , , provided that , which enacted this chapter, be cited as the National Vocational Loan Insurance Act of 1965.Pub. L. 89–287, § 179 Stat. 1037Pub. L. 89–287Oct. 22, 1965
Section 982, , , , authorized Commissioner to make advances to State and nonprofit private loan insurance programs.Pub. L. 89–287, § 379 Stat. 1037Oct. 22, 1965

Section 983, , , , prohibited Commissioner from issuing certificates of insurance to lenders in States having adequate non-Federal loan insurance programs.Pub. L. 89–287, § 479 Stat. 1038Oct. 22, 1965
Section 984, , , ; , , , set forth scope and duration of loan insurance program of this chapter.Pub. L. 89–287, § 579 Stat. 1038Pub. L. 90–460, § 1(b)(1)82 Stat. 634Oct. 22, 1965Aug. 3, 1968
Section 985, , , , limited annual and aggregate amounts available to individuals as loans and covered by insurance under this chapter.Pub. L. 89–287, § 679 Stat. 1039Oct. 22, 1965
Section 986, , , , provided for insurance coverage for loans made by eligible lenders, regardless of source of such loaned funds.Pub. L. 89–287, § 779 Stat. 1039Oct. 22, 1965

Section 987, , , ; , , , set forth prerequisites of student eligibility and terms and conditions of note executed by student.Pub. L. 89–287, § 879 Stat. 1039Pub. L. 90–460, § 2(c)(1)82 Stat. 634Oct. 22, 1965Aug. 3, 1968

Section 988, , , ; , §§ 1(b)(2), 2(c)(2), (d), , , provided for reduction of student interest costs by Federal payments.Pub. L. 89–287, § 979 Stat. 1041Pub. L. 90–46082 Stat. 634Oct. 22, 1965Aug. 3, 1968

Section 989, , , , , , , authorized Commissioner to make direct loans to students residing in areas where loans insurable under this chapter are unavailable.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1079 Stat. 1043Pub. L. 90–460, § 1(b)(3)82 Stat. 634Oct. 22, 1965Aug. 3, 1968
Section 990, , , , provided for certificates of insurance to be issued to eligible lenders.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1179 Stat. 1043Oct. 22, 1965
Section 991, , , , set forth procedure for collection in case of default, death, or disability of student borrower.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1279 Stat. 1045Oct. 22, 1965
Section 992, , , , established Vocational Student Loan Insurance Fund.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1379 Stat. 1046Oct. 22, 1965
Section 993, , , , enumerated powers and duties of Commissioner with respect to carrying out purposes of this chapter.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1479 Stat. 1047Oct. 22, 1965
Section 994, , , , established Advisory Council on Insured Loans to Vocational Students in the Office of Education.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1579 Stat. 1048Oct. 22, 1965
Section 995, , , , authorized Federal credit unions to make insured loans to student members.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1679 Stat. 1048Oct. 22, 1965
Section 996, , , , defined “eligible institution”, “eligible lender”, “line of credit”, “State”, “Secretary”, and “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 89–287, § 1779 Stat. 1048Oct. 22, 1965
Statutory Notes and Related Subsidiaries
Effective Date of RepealRepeal applicable to loans made on or after the 60th day after , see .Oct. 16, 1968section 116(e) of Pub. L. 90–575

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities of the Vocational Student Loan Insurance Fund, , , provided that:Pub. L. 90–575, title I, § 116(c)(2)82 Stat. 1024Oct. 16, 1968“All assets and liabilities of the vocational student loan insurance fund established by section 13 of the National Vocational Student Loan Insurance Act of 1965 [], matured or contingent, shall be transferred to, and become assets and liabilities of, the student loan insurance fund established by section 431 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 []. Payments in connection with defaults of loans made on or after the sixtieth day after the date of enactment of this Act [] and insured by the Commissioner (under the authority of subsection (e)(3) or (e)(4) of this section [set out as a note under ]) under the National Vocational Student Loan Insurance Act of 1965 [sections 981 to 996 of this title] shall be paid out of the fund established by such section 431.”section 992 of this titlesection 1081 of this titlesection 1083 of this titleOct. 16, 1968
